_meta.description: Per-token overrides for display name, subtype, or any field the auto-discovery got wrong. Address-keyed. Only fields you set here override the cron's auto-discovered values; everything else falls through.

schema.notes: free text — shown on the catalog view page
schema.flags_added: extra flags to add to scoring.flags
schema.warning: free text — shown prominently if present (for tokens that have a real risk)
schema.logo_url: Direct URL to a token logo image (PNG/SVG, ~64-256px square). Used by catalog UI and downstream consumers. Falls back to a colored letter-circle if the URL 404s or isn't set.

_meta.note_on_hardcoded_overrides: Some overrides live in the cron code itself (Stage 7b HARDCODED_OVERRIDES dict) rather than this file — specifically the boneLUNA naming case, which also needs to propagate _display_overridden + _display_original to sources.eris for transparency UI. Normal cases belong here. See PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.md 'Two-tier override system' for context.
_meta.notes_2026_06_05: Audited all curated logo URLs against chain-registry assetlists. Many had wrong filename casing (e.g. arbLUNA.png → arbluna.svg) or wrong chain (e.g. FUEL was on migaloo, actually on neutron). All 20 URLs now HTTP 200 verified.

ibc/88386AC48152D48B34B082648DF836F97550.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Cosmos Hub (Eureka IBC route). The '.atom' suffix refers to the bridge path through Cosmos Hub, not a Cosmos-native asset. Acquire via Skip.go (Send to Terra → WBTC) or manually via Eureka bridge.
ibc/88386AC48152D48B34B082648DF836F97550.warning: Multiple wBTC variants exist on Terra: wBTC.atom (this — Ethereum via Cosmos Hub), WBTC.axl (Ethereum via Axelar), WBTC.osmo (Ethereum via Osmosis). They are SEPARATE Terra addresses for the same underlying Ethereum WBTC. TLA pools whitelist specific variants — confirm address before depositing.

ibc/05D299885B07905B6886F554B39346EA6761.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via the Axelar network. Distinct from wBTC.atom (Cosmos Hub route) and WBTC.osmo (Osmosis route).
ibc/05D299885B07905B6886F554B39346EA6761.warning: Variant trap: TLA may have pools for wBTC.atom but NOT WBTC.axl, or vice versa. WBTC.axl appears in the WBTC.axl-WBTC.osmo LP, NOT in LUNA-wBTC.atom LP. Always verify pool's exact underlying token addresses before depositing.

ibc/CF57A83CED6CEC7D706631B5DC53ABC21B7E.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Osmosis. Distinct from wBTC.atom (Cosmos Hub route) and WBTC.axl (Axelar route).
ibc/CF57A83CED6CEC7D706631B5DC53ABC21B7E.warning: Variant trap: WBTC.osmo appears in LUNA-WBTC.osmo LP (Skeleton Swap variant) and in the WBTC.axl-WBTC.osmo LP. Not interchangeable with wBTC.atom — they have separate Terra addresses despite the same underlying Ethereum asset.

_example_wBTCatom_disabled._note: OBSOLETE — replaced by the live entry above at the actual ibc/88386AC4... address. Remove this stub when comfortable.

ibc/27394FB092D2ECCD56123C74F36E4C1F9260.notes: ATOM from Cosmos Hub via standard IBC. Logo from cosmos/chain-registry cosmoshub folder.

ibc/223FF539430381ADAB3A66AC4822E253C3F8.notes: Drop Protocol's liquid-staked ATOM (dATOM) — issued on Cosmos Hub via Drop's chain.

ibc/65B3EB6263482979FD7A80E3FFB9D0C85CFB.notes: Astroport's staked governance token, native on Neutron, bridged to Terra via IBC.

ibc/A356EC90DC3AE43D485514DA7260EDC7ABB5.notes: Lido's wrapped staked ETH, bridged via Neutron.

ibc/0E90026619DD296AD4EF9546396F292B465B.notes: Restricted SWTH — Carbon's vesting token variant.

ibc/B3F639855EE7478750CC8F82072307ED6E13.notes: Eris's amplified WHALE — auto-compounded WHALE LST on Migaloo.

terra1jjvy4s4tyw3ym6s3wk896up6jthvha9vtw.notes: Creda Finance's wrapped WBTC on Terra. Minted natively against collateral on Creda — not a bridge. Uses generic WBTC logo as visual reference.

_curation_queue.description: Tokens we want to override but haven't filled in yet. Move to 'tokens' above when ready.

candidates.hint: USDC at ibc/2C962DAB... — Eris API claims coingecko_id 'usd-coin' but CG actually maps this Terra address to 'ibc-bridged-usdc' (a.k.a. USDC.N for the Noble variant). Verified by independent CG terra-2 platform lookup during 2026-06-02 audit. Catalog Stage 7c surfaces this as a 'mismatch' status already; an override could add a note explaining the canonical CG ID is ibc-bridged-usdc.
EURe at ibc/8D52B251... — Eris API claims 'monerium-eur-money' (which is the deprecated v1 token labeled 'EURe [OLD]' on CG). Should be 'monerium-eur-money-2'. Catalog Stage 7c flags as 'mismatch'.
WETH.axl at the WETH.axl address — Eris API claims 'ethereum' (i.e. native ETH!). Should be 'weth' (the wrapped token). Critical confusion: WETH ≠ ETH, even at CG level.

PAXG at ibc/0EF56305... — successfully resolved to 'pax-gold' via Stage 7c bridge-trace fallback (Ethereum 0x45804880...). Consider adding an explicit note that this token represents 1 troy ounce of physical gold held by Paxos (real-world counterparty risk distinct from pure crypto).
